name: tpl-en-marketing-tools
description: A template for building EN marketing tools projects using MJML.

scripts.build: node scripts/annotate-excluded.mjs && mjml ./.build/*.mjml -o ./dist/ --config.allowIncludes=true --config.validationLevel=skip && node scripts/restore-excluded.mjs && rsync -a --delete --exclude='originals/' ./src/assets/ ./dist/assets/ && cp ./src/*.mjml ./dist/

author: 4Site Interactive Studios
